title: eval_size_test takes message_size directly, not Ctx
description: eval_size_test(forms, message_size: usize) takes the size value directly rather than a full &Ctx. A reviewer might suggest uniformity with the other test functions (all of which take &Ctx). The narrowed signature is better: the size test has no dependency on headers, variables, or regex_cache; accepting a fat context struct would widen the coupling surface with no benefit. The pattern also makes the dependency explicit and makes the function independently testable.
